data.body:
## Description

Create tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh with structural/behavioral tests for the /dso:onboarding skill, and update tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh to include the new skill.

### New test file: tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh
Tests to write:
- test_skill_file_exists: SKILL.md exists at plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- test_frontmatter_valid: frontmatter has name=onboarding, user-invocable=true
- test_sub_agent_guard_present: Orchestrator Signal variant SUB-AGENT-GUARD block exists
- test_understanding_areas_complete: references all 7 areas (stack, commands, architecture, infrastructure, CI, design, enforcement)
- test_scratchpad_instructions: contains scratchpad/temp file append instructions
- test_detection_integration: references project-detect.sh for grounded detection
- test_socratic_dialogue_pattern: contains Socratic dialogue pattern
- test_architect_foundation_offer: offers /dso:architect-foundation at completion

### Update: tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh
Add check_guard_orchestrator_signal onboarding to the user-interaction skills list.

### .test-index RED marker
Add entry: plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md: tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh, tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh [test_skill_file_exists]

## File Impact
- tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh (create)
- tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh (modify)
- .test-index (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes with RED-marked tests tolerated
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] At least 8 test functions in test-onboarding-skill.sh
  Verify: grep -c 'test_' tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 8)}'
- [ ] test-sub-agent-guard.sh includes onboarding
  Verify: grep -q 'onboarding' tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh
- [ ] .test-index has RED marker
  Verify: grep -q 'onboarding/SKILL.md.*\[test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
